campaign.name: Stop Tool Sprawl. Start Solving.
campaign.objective: Generate 500 qualified pipeline leads within 90 days while establishing Smoke Test Co as the integration-first platform for mid-market engineering teams
campaign.targetAudience: CTOs, VP Engineering, and Engineering Directors at mid-market B2B SaaS companies ($50M+ revenue, 51-500 employees) who currently manage 3+ disconnected engineering tools and are actively evaluating engineering platform consolidation solutions
campaign.positioning: The only engineering platform built for mid-market complexity—enterprise-grade reliability and features without enterprise bloat or pricing complexity
keyMessages: Consolidate fragmented engineering tools into one platform that integrates natively with your existing stack
Achieve measurable ROI within 90 days through reduced tool sprawl and streamlined workflows
Enterprise-grade security and compliance (SOC 2) without enterprise pricing or complexity
Join 50+ mid-market engineering teams who replaced tool sprawl with one focused platform
campaign.timeline: 3 months (Q2 2026): Month 1 - Asset creation and community seeding, Month 2 - Campaign launch with LinkedIn ads and webinar, Month 3 - Retargeting and trial push

contentPlan.purpose: Middle-of-funnel solution education; positions Smoke Test Co as the integration-first platform

contentPlan.purpose: Bottom-of-funnel proof; addresses budget concerns with concrete timeline
contentPlan.callToAction: Get our free Engineering ROI Calculator

steps.purpose: Qualify timing + move to nurture if needed

routingRules.action: add to long-term nurture + monitor for engagement

salesQualifiedHandoff.sqaThreshold: score >= 60 AND (demo_booked == true OR timeline == '< 30 days')
salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: 1. Automated Slack alert to #sales-alerts channel with lead details and score. 2. Sales rep receives SMS + email notification within 1 hour of SQA. 3. AE reviews lead context and engagement history within 2 hours. 4. AE contacts lead within 1 hour for demo scheduling. 5. CRM updated with SQA status and assigned AE. 6. Daily standup includes SQA leads for prioritization.
